title: Senior Financial Analyst - Bajaj Finance Consulting Pvt Ltd - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Bajaj Finance Consulting Pvt Ltd - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Bajaj Finance Consulting Pvt Ltd in Patna is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Bajaj Finance Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Bajaj Finance Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Finance Consulting Pvt Ltd!
